name: Cookie政策页面布局
description: RummyRoyal 主题Cookie政策页面布局

config.content.title: Cookie Policy
config.content.body: This Cookie Policy explains how RummyRoyal uses cookies and similar technologies to provide, protect, and improve our services.
config.toc.items:
What Are Cookies|Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences and improve your experience.
Types of Cookies We Use|We use essential cookies for platform functionality, analytics cookies to understand usage patterns, and preference cookies to remember your settings.
Third-Party Cookies|We may use cookies from analytics providers and advertising partners to measure performance and deliver relevant content.
Managing Cookies|You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect platform functionality.
Updates|We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
